note: v2 (post-Codex-REVISE). CFO + Framer extracted from code (verified). NAMI pending — its dispatch isn't a simple handler dict (routes to platform ops); extract before adding. Unregistered agents fail-open -> warn, never block. strict:false everywhere for the warn window; flip per-agent only after its resolver is faithfully encoded + a clean window. NOTE: receivers dispatch on TOP-LEVEL action first, payload.action as fallback (Codex Finding 1) — validate the top-level dispatched field.

cfo.code_path: scripts/cfo-agent.js:199-289 (CAPABILITY_ENDPOINTS + WRITE_CAPABILITIES + KEYWORD_MAP); ALL_CAPABILITY_NAMES = the exact set CFO's error advertises
cfo._keyword_caveat: CFO uses single-token word-boundary match (cfo-agent.js:311-338). v2 corrects the prior false set: added 'ar', changed 'anomaly'->'anomal', dropped non-capabilities draft_invoice/draft_invoice_created (handled by the ecosystem route, not resolveCapability). Exact resolver replication is a strict-flip prerequisite.

framer._note: Framer dispatches on exact action keys (handlers dict); 'expand_asset' is a back-compat alias for generate_derivatives. No keyword matching — exact-only. This is the ACD->Framer creative_brief case from the design (now in vocabulary).
